title: bromopsis pumpelliana subsp. ornans
intro: Bromopsis pumpelliana subsp. ornans, also known as mountain bent or pumpelly's sedge, is a type of grass-like plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Bromopsis pumpelliana subsp. ornans include its ability to help reduce swelling, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, often in combination with other plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
